*** 1 INJ *** AN EF-0 TORNADO WITH A PATH LENGTH OF 0.6 MILES AND A PATH WIDTH OF 30 YARDS. A TRAVEL TRAILER WAS DESTROYED WHEN TORNADIC WINDS LOFTED IT OVER POWER LINES AND DEPOSITED THE DEBRIS IN A GROVE OF TREES 50 YARDS TO THE EAST. THE RESIDENT OF THE TRAILER SUSTAINED NON-LIFE THREATENING INJURIES. THE TORNADO TOUCHED DOWN AGAIN TWO MILES TO THE EAST...UPROOTING SEVERAL LARGE PINE TREES.
